T0128.title: Pig Feed
T0128.definition: Pre-scripted dialogue templates and supporting materials carefully crafted by fraud rings to gain victims’ trust and induce them to transfer money.
T0128.description: “Pig feed” serves as standardized tooling for the fraud process, containing complete conversation templates that cover everything from initial greetings and persona building to emotional escalation and the introduction of investment topics. The content includes daily greetings, emotional stories, flaunting-wealth photos, and even fake profit screenshots. Operators simply follow the script to efficiently “feed” targets and steer them step by step into the trap.
T0128.usageExample: This set of pig feed is tailored for divorced women; the opening lines need to hook them through emotional resonance.
